project_summary: An AI-powered platform that analyzes football player performance from mobile-recorded videos, extracting movement and skill data, evaluating abilities, and connecting players with clubs, scouts, and agents. Features include player profiles, market value estimation, and performance reports.
first_mvp_scope: Mobile video upload and processing for extracting basic movement and skill metrics (speed, agility)
Player profile creation with shareable performance reports
core_value_proposition: Democratizes access to professional football scouting by enabling players worldwide to showcase their skills objectively through AI-analyzed video, bridging the gap between undiscovered talent and recruiters.
biggest_risk: Achieving reliable and accurate AI analysis from diverse, low-quality mobile videos across different environments.
fastest_path_to_money: Charge players a fee for premium performance reports and direct exposure to scouts/agents; offer clubs/scouts a subscription for access to the talent database.
recommended_target_user: Aspiring football players aged 14-22 in regions with limited scouting infrastructure (e.g., Africa, South America, Southeast Asia).
killer_insight: Partnering early with local football academies and leagues can provide a steady stream of structured video data, improving AI accuracy and building initial trust in the platform.
